If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Operator gallery: Togawa Sakiko From Arknights Terra Wiki < [Togawa Sakiko](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko "Togawa Sakiko") [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery#searchInput) | | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko "Togawa Sakiko") | [File](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/File "Togawa Sakiko/File") | [Story](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Story "Togawa Sakiko/Story") | [Overview](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Overview "Togawa Sakiko/Overview") | [Dialogue](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Dialogue "Togawa Sakiko/Dialogue") | Gallery | [Trivia](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Trivia "Togawa Sakiko/Trivia") | ## Contents - [1Skins](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery#Skins) - [2Outfits](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery#Outfits) - [3Miscelaneous](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery#Miscelaneous) - [3.1Promotional material](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery#Promotional_material) ## Skins\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery?action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Skins")\] | Base | | --- | | ![Togawa Sakiko.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Togawa_Sakiko.png?74d955) | Sakiko Togawa's day-to-day attire.
A meticulously crafted outfit from a cultural context unknown to us, though its combat applicability appears to be nil. | | Elite 2 | | --- | | ![Togawa Sakiko Elite 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Togawa_Sakiko_Elite_2.png?ede6ed) | Sakiko Togawa's [Ave Mujica](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica "Ave Mujica") stage costume.
Oblivionis—Do not fear being forgotten. | ## Outfits\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery?action=edit§ion=2 "Edit section: Outfits")\] | Master of Melodia
~~Outfit Voucher~~ | | --- | | ![Togawa Sakiko Skin 1.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Togawa_Sakiko_Skin_1.png?79fb33) | One of Sakiko Togawa's [Terran](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Terra "Terra") stage costumes.
_Fearing not oblivion, she bears it all._
Ave Mujica Collaborative Series/Master of Melodia. Tolling her decision, this stage costume is made manifest in the realm of dreams. She is the Creator of the Haven, [Ave Mujica](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ave_Mujica "Ave Mujica"). She awaits in stilled elegance, that she would entice her audience unto this world.
**How to obtain:** [Somniloquium Serenum](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Somniloquium_Serenum "Somniloquium Serenum") ( [Outfit Store](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit_Store "Outfit Store"), 18 [![Originite Prime](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Originite_Prime_icon.png/20px-Originite_Prime_icon.png?83ccc8)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Originite_Prime "Originite Prime")) | ## Miscelaneous\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery?action=edit§ion=3 "Edit section: Miscelaneous")\] - [![Togawa Sakiko as a Rhodes Island Sarkaz Operator during the events of Somniloquium Serenum](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Togawa_Sakiko_Dreamscape.png/200px-Togawa_Sakiko_Dreamscape.png?dcd2b0)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Togawa_Sakiko_Dreamscape.png "Togawa Sakiko as a Rhodes Island Sarkaz Operator during the events of Somniloquium Serenum") Togawa Sakiko as a [Rhodes Island](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rhodes_Island "Rhodes Island") [Sarkaz](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Sarkaz "Sarkaz") Operator during the events of [Somniloquium Serenum](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Somniloquium_Serenum "Somniloquium Serenum") - [![Sakiko with her hood on](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Togawa_Sakiko_Dreamscape_%28Hooded%29.png/200px-Togawa_Sakiko_Dreamscape_%28Hooded%29.png?c3ae4c)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Togawa_Sakiko_Dreamscape_(Hooded).png "Sakiko with her hood on") Sakiko with her hood on - [![The dinning hall of Sakiko's house inside her dreamscape](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Background-Sakiko%27s_House_Dining_Hall.png/200px-Background-Sakiko%27s_House_Dining_Hall.png?ad9e79)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Background-Sakiko%27s_House_Dining_Hall.png "The dinning hall of Sakiko's house inside her dreamscape") The dinning hall of Sakiko's house inside her dreamscape - [![Sakiko's piano room inside her dreamscape](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Background-Sakiko%27s_Piano_Room.png/200px-Background-Sakiko%27s_Piano_Room.png?e2d0ca)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Background-Sakiko%27s_Piano_Room.png "Sakiko's piano room inside her dreamscape") Sakiko's piano room inside her dreamscape ### Promotional material\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Togawa_Sakiko/Gallery?action=edit§ion=4 "Edit section: Promotional material")\] -
